what_changed: Sailfin Dragon banner: TPWD -> No banner (exempt). TPWD does NOT regulate non-snake reptiles.
Argentine Tegu banner: TPWD -> No banner (exempt). Same reason.
Portion language updated: 'golf-ball pieces (~1 inch)' replaces '2-3 inch chunks' for multi-animal exhibits.
Multi-animal feeding rule added to JSON header rules.
All 10 Gold Standard visual posters rebuilt.
New Gold Standard Written Companion PDF added (steward-to-steward narrative).
tpwd_finding: TPWD Controlled Exotic Snake Permit covers only non-indigenous venomous snakes + 6 named large constrictors. No species in LIFE roster falls under TPWD authority for display.
